title: ardisia crispa f. xanthocarpa
intro: Ardisia crispa f. xanthocarpa, also known as the red fruit ardisia, is a variety of the Ardisia crispa plant, a species of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ardisia crispa f. xanthocarpa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Ardisia crispa f. xanthocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried roots and leaves, to harness its medicinal properties.
